positive: Minimalist line art drawing of a celestial constellation forming a stylized, interconnected animal silhouette (e.g., a leaping stag, a rising phoenix, or a crescent moon bear). The design should be centered, highly geometric, and utilize thin, flowing lines against a solid, negative space background. Style: Modern zentangle combined with negative space illustration. Color palette: Monochromatic, using deep indigo and cream white only. Lighting: Flat, even studio lighting to maximize contrast and clarity. Composition: Perfect circular or square crop, emphasizing clean outlines and strong symmetry. Print-friendly details: Vector art quality, high resolution, perfect scalability for apparel prints, seamless repetition potential.
negative: text, words, logo, trademark, watermark, noisy, blurry, grainy, low quality, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, poor lines, signature, messy, photo, realistic
